_comment: These forecast probabilities come from the CPC ENSO Diagnostic Discussion + CPC/IRI probability table. They are NOT available as a clean machine-readable feed, so update them by hand when CPC issues a new discussion (second Thursday of each month). Source: https://www.cpc.ncep.noaa.gov/products/analysis_monitoring/enso_advisory/ensodisc.shtml
phase_desc: Seasonal SST anomalies sit near the borderline threshold, but weekly values have surged and the atmosphere is beginning to couple. A rapid transition toward El Niño is underway.

el_nino_onset.note: Chance El Niño conditions emerge this season — CPC El Niño Watch in effect.

el_nino_persist.note: Chance El Niño continues through the Northern Hemisphere winter peak.

strong.note: Chance the peak is classified “strong or very strong” (≈2-in-3).

super.note: Chance the peak exceeds +2.0 °C relative Niño 3.4 (≈1-in-3).
